About Merc Technologies

Since 2003, we've been manufacturing precision gauges for the world's most demanding industries. Built on a foundation of technical expertise and unwavering commitment to quality.

Our Story

Merc Technologies was founded in 2003 by a team of precision manufacturing veterans who recognized a critical gap in the gauge industry: the need for a manufacturer that could deliver both standard and highly customized gauges with the same level of precision and service.

What started as a small shop with three employees and a commitment to quality has grown into a leading gauge manufacturer serving Fortune 500 companies and precision machine shops alike. Our growth has been driven by word-of-mouth recommendations from satisfied customers who appreciate our technical expertise, quick turnaround, and unwavering attention to detail.

Today, we operate from a 25,000 sq ft climate-controlled facility equipped with the latest CNC grinding, lapping, and measurement equipment. But our real strength isn't just our equipment—it's our people. Our team includes master gauge makers with decades of experience, meticulous quality technicians, and application engineers who understand your challenges.

Facility & Capabilities

Manufacturing Excellence

  • 25,000 sq ft climate-controlled facility

    Temperature and humidity controlled to ±2°F and ±5% RH to ensure dimensional stability during manufacturing and inspection.

  • State-of-the-art CNC grinding and lapping equipment

    Latest generation machines capable of holding tolerances to 0.000020" (0.5 microns) with automated in-process gauging.

  • Full metrology lab with NIST-traceable standards

    Equipped with air-bearing comparators, optical comparators, CMM, and thread measurement systems for complete dimensional verification.

Our Philosophy

Precision First

Quality is never compromised. Every gauge is manufactured to exacting standards and 100% inspected before it leaves our facility. We don't ship "close enough"—we ship perfect.

Customer Partnership

We view ourselves as an extension of your quality team. When you have a challenging application, our engineers work with you to develop the optimal solution—even if it means recommending a competitor's product when it's a better fit.

Continuous Improvement

The gauge industry evolves, and so do we. We continuously invest in new equipment, training, and processes to ensure we're delivering the best possible products using the most advanced techniques available.

Our Vision

We're building Merc Technologies to be the gauge manufacturer that quality professionals turn to first—whether they need a simple plug gauge tomorrow or a complex custom solution for a unique application.

Technical Leadership

Continuing to push the boundaries of what's possible in gauge manufacturing through investment in advanced manufacturing technology and metrology equipment.

Industry Education

Sharing our expertise through technical seminars, application notes, and one-on-one consultation to help raise the quality standards across manufacturing.

Sustainable Growth

Expanding our capabilities and capacity while maintaining the attention to detail and customer service that built our reputation.

Certifications & Standards

ISO 9001:2015

Certified quality management system

ASME B89.1.5

Plain gauge manufacturing standards

ISO 1938

Thread gauge specifications

NIST Traceable

All calibrations and certifications

Work With Us

Ready to experience the Merc Technologies difference? Contact our team to discuss your gauge requirements or schedule a facility tour.
